hero.title:
BUILDING
THE FUTURE
hero.subtitle: 8th-grade embedded systems engineer, robotics builder, UI architect, terminal designer, and experimental developer engineering futuristic hardware ecosystems, autonomous machines, and immersive cybernetic interfaces.

projects.title: DEPLOYED SYSTEMS
projects.description: Experimental robotics platforms, embedded firmware systems, futuristic UI architectures, and immersive engineering concepts designed and engineered inside the Reyansh Labs ecosystem.

cards.title: Pioneer Robot
cards.description: Agricultural automation platform powered by the Realtek AMB82-Mini featuring AI-assisted insect detection, telemetry systems, autonomous logic, and modular hardware design.

cards.title: EnviroOS
cards.description: Futuristic embedded operating environment for TFT hardware systems featuring atmospheric telemetry and environmental analysis.

cards.title: mpt-os
cards.description: Python and JavaScript powered futuristic terminal ecosystem with shell simulation, command architecture, autocomplete concepts, and realistic kernel UX.

cards.title: SMART EVM
cards.description: Arduino Uno based electronic voting system with touch-based interfaces and embedded logic.

cards.title: BRAHMI_DEC
cards.description: Ancient script interpretation logic systems for Prakrit translation and pattern decoding.
